headline: How Do DG’s AI Audio Push and Governance Pressures Reframe Dollar General’s Efficiency Story?
summary: Dollar General previously announced plans to roll out an AI-enabled in-store audio network with QSIC to around 6,000 additional stores across 48 states by the second quarter of 2026, doubling its current audio footprint to 12,000 locations and enabling more localized, data-driven advertising and measurement. At the same time, the company is facing multiple shareholder proposals on human rights, board accountability, and shareholder rights, highlighting growing investor scrutiny of its...

summary: Walmart's digital and ad engines meet Dollar General's operational rebound as both chase value shoppers.

headline: Dollar General names VP of supply chain optimization
summary: In addition to appointing Matt Lucas to guide improvements in the retailer's supply chain network, Kyle Gorman was promoted to VP of distribution.

headline: BetterInvesting™ Magazine Update on The Charles Schwab Corp. (NYSE: SCHW) and Dollar General Corp. (NYSE: DG)
summary: Charles Schwab Corp.'s recent report has investors wondering if the company's stock is fairly valued. Or is it in the buy range? As such, the Editorial Advisory and Securities Review Committee of BetterInvesting Magazine considers Charles Schwab (NYSE: SCHW) as worthy of further study and has named the company its "Stock to Study" for the June/July 2026 issue for investors' informational and educational use.
